subcodes.first_line: O My Name! Verily the Book which was sent unto thee hath reached thee from Him Who hath testified to that whereunto God hath testified concerning His Own Self, through His Own Self [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمی قد بلغ کتاب الذی ارسل الیک من الذی شهد بما شهد الله لذاته بذاته الی
subcodes.subjects: @acting according to the exigencies of the day; pragmatism, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @justice and wrath of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
